_comment: National-chain FLAGGING list for the local-landmark datasets. This does NOT auto-remove — `node scripts/check-chains.mjs [city]` (and a CI guard test in apply-difficulty.test.mjs) flag any in-play venue whose name matches a token (apostrophe-safe, word-boundary normalized — see matchNationalChain in apply-difficulty-lib.mjs); a human VERIFIES each, then marks the real chains `isNationalChain: true` in data/fame-<city>.json (apply-difficulty drops those) or adds a local namesake's id to keepIds below. To start excluding a newly-spotted chain, add ONE token here — no web search needed. Tokens are lowercase, apostrophes deleted ('Church's'->'churchs'); keep them DISTINCTIVE to minimise namesake flags. Florida-regional brands are intentionally OMITTED so they stay (see keepRegional_note).
keepRegional_note: FL-regional brands intentionally NOT listed (they stay): Publix, Beef 'O' Brady's, Miller's Ale House, PDQ, Pollo Tropical, Tijuana Flats, Burger Monger (St. Pete-founded), Bavaro's, Oak & Stone, Pipo's, Mr. Empanada, Leverock's, Flippers Pizzeria, Fresh Kitchen, Fitlife Foods, Datz, Square 1 Burgers, Pincho. Borderline FL-origin-but-now-big (Tropical Smoothie, Sonny's BBQ, Hawkers, Maple Street Biscuit, Kobe) left off pending an owner call.

keepIds.chilis-south-indian-cuisine: Seattle South-Indian restaurant — not Chili's the chain
keepIds.village-inn: Chicago's local 'The Village Inn Bar' — not the Village Inn chain (St. Pete's actual chain is fame-flagged isNationalChain)
